## About Us - My Wall

**Page type:** about
**Summary:** MyWall's About Us page covers the company's origin as a hyperlocal influencer-brand matchmaking platform in Dubai, its expansion to India, and its mission/vision to bridge the gap between creators and brands.

**Key facts:**

- MyWall started as a hyperlocal platform in Dubai connecting luxury stores with influencers.
- Even top hotels in Dubai reported struggling to find and collaborate with the right influencers.
- MyWall expanded from Dubai to India after observing the same creator-brand disconnect there.
- MyWall's mission is to bridge the gap between creators and brands, enabling seamless collaborations that drive real impact.
- MyWall's vision is to be the go-to app for creators — an all-in-one platform addressing every challenge creators face.
- MyWall believes creators are the new game-changers of the global economy, capable of reshaping brands and industries.
- MyWall offers two apps: Mywall Brands App and Mywall Creators App.
- MyWall is headquartered in Gurugram, Haryana, India.

**Brand terminology:** bridge the gap between creators and brands; seamless collaborations; authentic content creators; go-to app for creators; all-in-one platform; creators are the new game-changers; hyperlocal platform; ecosystem

**Audience:** Both content creators/influencers seeking brand collaboration opportunities and businesses/brands (including luxury retail and hospitality) looking to connect with the right creators.

**Source:** https://mywall.me/about-us

## My Wall

**Page type:** landing
**Summary:** MyWall is an all-in-one AI-powered influencer marketing platform that connects brands and creators for campaign planning, execution, and ROI tracking. It serves both brands/agencies and individual creators within a single shared workspace.

**Key facts:**

- MyWall offers a database of 150M+ creators searchable with 30+ filters including niche, engagement rate, views, and visual score.
- The platform includes MyWall IMS (Influencer Management System) for briefs, invites, approvals, deliverables, payouts, and real-time ROI reporting.
- MyWall Genie enables competitor collaboration tracking, top-performing content analysis, and content inspiration saving.
- The Creator Marketplace lets brands post campaigns and receive applications from verified creators with rates, timelines, and past work.
- MyWall has launched official creator apps on both Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
- Growth Tools include Auto DM (with no profile activation restrictions), Brand Link-in-Bio, and Magic Menu.
- The platform supports barter, paid, UGC, product collaboration, and sales-based campaigns.
- MyWall is headquartered in Gurugram, Haryana, India.
- The platform provides audit logs, role-based access, encryption, and platform-grade security.

**Brand terminology:** MyWall IMS; MyWall Genie; Creator Marketplace; Creator App; Brand Mobile App; My Tools; Auto DM; Brand Link-in-Bio; Magic Menu; visual score; Fast to Live; Creator-First; One System; campaign completion rate; content live

**Audience:** Two distinct audiences: brands and agencies seeking to run and scale influencer campaigns, and individual creators/influencers looking for verified brand deals and collaboration opportunities.

**Source:** https://mywall.me

## My Wall

**Page type:** landing
**Summary:** MyWall is an all-in-one AI-powered influencer marketing platform connecting brands and creators for campaign discovery, execution, and ROI tracking. It serves both brands/agencies and individual creators through a shared workspace.

**Key facts:**

- MyWall positions itself as an all-in-one influencer marketing platform powered by AI.
- The platform offers a database of 150M+ creators searchable with 30+ filters (niche, engagement rate, views, visual score, etc.).
- Key brand-side features include: IMS Dashboard, MyWall Genie (competitor analysis), Creator Marketplace, Brand Mobile App, and Growth Tools.
- MyWall Genie lets brands see which creators competitors collaborate with and save winning content formats.
- Creator-side features include a Creator App (available on Play Store and App Store), campaign discovery feed, and Auto DM growth tools.
- Auto DM has no restriction on profile activation.
- Campaign workflow covers: brief creation, creator applications with pricing/timelines, brand approval, product shipping, content execution, go-live, and ROI reporting.
- Reports are built creator-wise and campaign-wise for ROI tracking.
- Platform supports barter, paid, UGC, product collaboration, and sales-based campaigns.
- Headquartered in Gurugram, Haryana, India.
- The platform claims verified brands and verified creators with audit logs and platform-grade security.

## MyWall’s Analytics Feature for Creators

**Page type:** blog
**Summary:** This page explains MyWall's built-in analytics dashboard designed specifically for content creators, covering its features that simplify performance tracking, audience insights, and collaboration data in one place.

**Key facts:**

- MyWall offers a built-in analytics dashboard curated specifically for content creators, designed to be simple, easy to use, and quick to interpret.
- Creators can track total views and reach across all connected platforms with timeframe filters: last month, last 3 months, last 6 months, and more.
- MyWall shows click rates and top-performing links (website, product pages, affiliate links) with click-through rate data across different time periods.
- MyWall tracks follower growth alongside average views, comments, likes, and shares to reveal content patterns (e.g., reels drive follower growth, carousels drive engagement).
- Past brand collaborations are recorded in the creator's dashboard and visible to brands, serving as proof of experience.
- Brands can rate creators after collaborations; these ratings appear publicly on the creator's MyWall profile as social proof.
- Audience demographics include breakdown by region, country, city, age group, and gender.
- An upcoming feature — Influencer Campaign Live Tracking — will provide real-time metrics including impressions, clicks, engagement, and conversions without waiting for post-campaign reports.
- MyWall enables campaign comparison (side-by-side) to identify which campaigns delivered better reach, engagement, and clicks.
- MyWall is headquartered in Gurugram, Haryana, India.

**Brand terminology:** MyWall analytics dashboard; Total Views and Reach; Click Rates & Top Links; Follower Growth & Average Engagement; Past Collaborations; Brand Ratings; Audience Demographics; Influencer Campaign Live Tracking; number-backed decisions; campaign comparison; top-performing posts

**Audience:** Content creators and influencers who find traditional platform analytics (Instagram, YouTube) overwhelming and want a simplified, creator-friendly dashboard to understand performance and pitch to brands more effectively.

**Source:** https://mywall.me/blog/mywall-analytics-feature-for-creators

## MyWall’s Barter Collaboration Feature: The Smartest Way for Brands & Influencers to Partner

**Page type:** blog
**Summary:** This blog post explains MyWall's barter collaboration feature, detailing how brands and influencers can partner by exchanging products/services for content without cash deals, and walks through campaign setup on the platform.

**Key facts:**

- One in every three influencer campaigns is now barter-based, per Collabstr 2024 report.
- Nano and micro influencers accounted for 78% of all brand collaborations in 2024, per Influencer Marketing Hub.
- MyWall allows creators with as few as 1,000 followers to sign up and apply for campaigns.
- Chinese Wok ran a barter campaign with 320 influencer partnerships (220 barter, 100 paid) delivering over 80 million views in 3 months.
- Elivaas Hotel (Lonavala) listed a weekend stay on MyWall; creators received stay, food, and amenities in exchange for 1–2 Instagram reels and stories.
- MyWall lets brands list products/services, set eligibility criteria, review applications, approve content, track product delivery, and monitor campaign ROI from one dashboard.
- Barter collaborations involve no upfront cash cost to brands, making them a low-risk entry point into influencer marketing.
- Future trends include long-term barter partnerships, hyper-targeted nano/micro creators, and combining barter with affiliate links or future paid slots.

**Brand terminology:** barter collaboration; barter campaign; creator economy; nano and micro influencers; UGC (user-generated content); MyWall; campaign listing; content deliverables; hyper-targeted creators; D2C companies

**Audience:** Emerging and established brands (especially D2C and retail) looking to run cost-effective influencer campaigns, as well as nano and micro influencers seeking brand partnerships without requiring large followings.

**Source:** https://mywall.me/blog/barter-collaboration-with-mywall

## My Wall, a Smart Influencer Marketing tool, to Launch your Campaigns

**Page type:** blog
**Summary:** This blog post explains how MyWall functions as an influencer marketing tool for brands, covering campaign setup, creator vetting, collaboration management, and real-world results from a case study with Elivaas Hotel.

**Key facts:**

- MyWall allows brands to list influencer campaigns with specific criteria including niche, location, follower count, content type, audience demographics, and timelines.
- Verified content creators on MyWall browse campaign listings and apply directly with their portfolios and media kits.
- Brands can launch both barter collaborations and paid collaborations through MyWall.
- Every creator on MyWall has a visible rating given by brands they've worked with; creators can also rate brands, ensuring mutual transparency.
- Elivaas Hotel used MyWall to execute 60+ influencer collaborations per month, generating millions of views, a surge in bookings, and increased social media followings, eventually scaling to 100 collabs per month.
- All campaign communication, briefs, deliverables, and timelines are centralized within MyWall, eliminating the need to switch between emails, DMs, or spreadsheets.
- Brands receive real-time notifications when creators apply, message, or submit deliverables.
- Brands can view creator portfolios and media kits, including content samples, audience demographics, past brand collaborations, and insights, before accepting applications.

**Brand terminology:** MyWall; My Wall; campaign listing; campaign brief; verified creators; media kits; barter collaboration; paid collaboration; self-select; creator credibility; deliverables; structured campaign; real-time notifications; shortlist creators

**Audience:** Brand marketers and marketing teams looking to launch, manage, and scale influencer marketing campaigns without manual outreach or fragmented workflows.

## How MyWall Connects Influencers to Premium Opportunities: Unlocking VIP Brand Deals for creators

**Page type:** blog
**Summary:** This blog post explains how MyWall connects influencers of all sizes to premium brand deals, highlighting its follower-count-agnostic approach, two collaboration models, and direct brand-creator connections without agencies.

**Key facts:**

- MyWall describes itself as the world's first creator lifestyle app that does not differentiate between influencers based on follower count.
- Creators with as few as 1,000 followers can access brand campaigns on MyWall.
- MyWall offers two collaboration types: Barter Collaborations (free experiences in exchange for content) and Offer Collaborations (exclusive discounts and custom deals).
- Barter collaboration examples include free stays at overseas resorts, spa sessions, and complimentary meals at fine-dining restaurants.
- MyWall eliminates third-party agencies and managers, enabling direct creator-to-brand connections through the app.
- MyWall uses smart campaign filters (by niche, location, follower count) and AI-powered suggestions to match creators with relevant campaigns.
- Partner brands include ITC and Tribo.
- The basic Pro plan gives creators access to all brand campaigns on the platform.

## How MyWall Helps Influencers Find the Perfect Brand Deals (And Vice Versa)

**Page type:** blog
**Summary:** This blog post explains how MyWall connects influencers with brand deals and helps brands find creators, detailing platform features for both sides of the creator economy.

**Key facts:**

- 81% of brands say finding the right influencer is the biggest challenge in influencer marketing (Source: Traackr).
- MyWall lets brands list upcoming campaigns with eligibility criteria, budget ranges, and briefs; pre-qualified creators can browse and apply.
- Upon campaign acceptance, influencers receive a unique QR code that activates only on a pre-decided date/time for in-person service verification.
- Brand-side managers scan the QR code via the MyWall manager app, which displays a green-tick confirmation of the influencer's identity and agreed deliverables.
- MyWall offers AI-powered campaign recommendations based on an influencer's past collaborations, engagement metrics, and industry.
- Creators can build personalized portfolios with custom themes, media kits, audience insights, and past collaborations.
- MyWall's Link-in-Bio tool turns social media bios into personalized landing pages for creator discovery.
- MyWall supports service exchange deals (e.g., complimentary hotel stay in exchange for content) as an alternative to paid collaborations.
- Brands can shortlist influencers and communicate directly via an integrated in-app messaging system without third-party intermediaries.
- A creator/brand analytics dashboard tracking collaborations, views, engagement rates, and campaign performance is in development.
- MyWall is headquartered in Gurugram, Haryana, India.

**Brand terminology:** MyWall; My Wall; creator economy; Link-in-Bio tool; service exchange deals; QR code verification; MyWall manager app; personalized portfolio; media kit; brand partnership requests; campaign brief; pre-qualified creators; customized feed; lifestyle application

**Audience:** Influencers/content creators seeking brand deals and brands seeking the right influencer partners; both sides of the influencer marketing ecosystem.

**Source:** https://mywall.me/blog/how-mywall-helps-influencers
